Title: Navigate to Settings Page
Preconditions: User is on the homepage.
Test Steps: 1. Click on the settings icon.
Expected Result: The settings page opens.

Title: Display New Location
Preconditions: User is on the homepage.
Test Steps: 1. Click on the new location icon.
Expected Result: A new location is displayed.

Title: Navigate to Location Details Page
Preconditions: User is on the homepage.
Test Steps: 1. Click on a location icon.
Expected Result: The location details page opens.

Title: Navigate to Pathfinder Page
Preconditions: User is on the homepage.
Test Steps: 1. Click on the Pathfinder icon.
Expected Result: The Pathfinder page opens.

Title: Swipe Up to Return to Homepage
Preconditions: User is on any other page.
Test Steps: 1. Perform a swipe-up gesture.
Expected Result: The user returns to the homepage.

Title: Return to Homepage from Pathfinder Page
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps: 1. Click on the "Indietro" button.
Expected Result: The user returns to the homepage.

Title: View Suggested Location from Pathfinder Page
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Indietro" button.
2. Select a response to the displayed question.
Expected Result: A suggested location is displayed if available.

Title: No Suggested Location Available from Pathfinder Page
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Indietro" button.
2. Select a response to the displayed question.
Expected Result: No suggested location is displayed.

Title: Open System Map from Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps: 1. Click on the "Navigate" button.
Expected Result: The system map opens.

Title: Open Yelp Site from Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Navigate" button.
2. Click on the "Open in Browser" button.
Expected Result: The Yelp site opens in the browser.

Title: Initiate Call from Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Navigate" button.
2. Click on the "Call Business" button.
Expected Result: The call to the business initiates.

Title: Return to Homepage from Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Navigate" button.
2. Click on the "Indietro" button.
Expected Result: The user returns to the homepage.

Title: Modify Preferences from Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Navigate" button.
2. Click on the "Indietro" button.
3. Click on the "Like/Dislike" button.
Expected Result: The user can modify their preferences.

Title: Negative Test Case - Invalid Input for Preferences Modification
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Navigate" button.
2. Click on the "Indietro" button.
3. Click on the "Like/Dislike" button.
4. Enter invalid input data.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid input.

Title: Edge Case - No Response Selected from Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Navigate" button.
2. Click on the "Indietro" button.
3. Do not select any response.
Expected Result: The user remains on the detailed page with no changes.

Title: Negative Test Case - Invalid Input for Response Selection
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Indietro" button.
2. Select a response to the displayed question using invalid input data.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid input.

Title: Edge Case - No Response Available from Pathfinder Page
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Indietro" button.
2. Select a response to the displayed question.
Expected Result: No suggested location is displayed due to no available suggestions.

Title: Edge Case - No Action Taken from Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Navigate" button.
2. Do not perform any additional actions.
Expected Result: The user remains on the detailed page with no changes.

Title: Edge Case - No Action Taken from Pathfinder Page
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page.

Expected Result: The user remains on the Pathfinder page with no changes.
